# Chapter 19: Hybrid Pipeline Patterns

This chapter shows how to **combine** deterministic and probabilistic approaches — getting the best of both worlds.

## The Hybrid Architecture

A hybrid pipeline routes queries based on their characteristics:

```javascript
async function hybridPipeline(query) {
  // Step 1: Classify the query
  const classification = classifyQuery(query);
  
  if (classification.type === "known_entity") {
    // Use deterministic: exact match, fast, precise
    return await deterministicSearch(query);
    
  } else if (classification.type === "open_ended") {
    // Use semantic: broader search, handles novel cases
    return await semanticSearch(query);
    
  } else if (classification.type === "fact_check") {
    // Use knowledge graph grounding
    return await kgGround(semanticSearch(query));
  }
}
```

### Query Classification

```javascript
function classifyQuery(query) {
  // Check if query matches known vocabulary
  const vocabMatch = matchVocabulary(query);
  
  if (vocabMatch.exact) {
    return { type: "known_entity", confidence: 0.95 };
  }
  
  // Check if it's a factual question
  if (query.match(/^(what is|who is|when did|where is)/i)) {
    return { type: "fact_check", confidence: 0.8 };
  }
  
  // Default: open-ended
  return { type: "open_ended", confidence: 0.5 };
}
```

## Routing Logic

```javascript
class QueryRouter {
  constructor(config) {
    this.deterministic = config.deterministic;
    this.semantic = config.semantic;
    this.grounding = config.grounding;
  }
  
  async route(query) {
    const classification = classifyQuery(query);
    
    switch (classification.type) {
      case "known_entity":
        return this.routeDeterministic(query);
        
      case "fact_check":
        return this.routeGrounded(query);
        
      default:
        return this.routeSemantic(query);
    }
  }
  
  async routeDeterministic(query) {
    const results = await this.deterministic.search(query);
    return { 
      results, 
      method: "deterministic",
      latency: results.latency 
    };
  }
  
  async routeGrounded(query) {
    // Semantic search, then ground in KG
    const semantic = await this.semantic.search(query);
    const grounded = await this.grounding.validate(semantic);
    return { 
      results: grounded, 
      method: "grounded",
      latency: semantic.latency + grounded.latency
    };
  }
}
```

## Cost Optimization

Hybrid pipelines optimize **cost** by using expensive methods only when needed:

```javascript
const costStructure = {
  deterministic: { perQuery: 0, coldStart: 0 },
  semantic: { perQuery: 0.01, coldStart: 2 },
  grounding: { perQuery: 0.001, coldStart: 0 }
};

// Route based on value, not just capability
function optimizeCost(queries) {
  const optimized = queries.map(q => {
    if (q.knownEntity) {
      return { ...q, method: "deterministic" };
    }
    if (q.requiresAccuracy) {
      return { ...q, method: "grounded" };
    }
    return { ...q, method: "semantic" };
  });
  
  return optimized;
}
```

## Summary

Hybrid pipelines combine:
- Deterministic for known entities (fast, precise)
- Semantic for open-ended (flexible)
- Grounding for accuracy-critical (safe)

Key Sources: Terraphim hybrid architecture, RAG optimization
